nasb.text: The breaker goes up before them; They break out, pass through the gate and go out by it. So their king goes on before them, And the Lord at their head.”

esv.text: He who opens the breach goes up before them; they break through and pass the gate, going out by it. Their king passes on before them, the Lord at their head.

cnv.text: 開路的人領先上去； 他們開路，闖門進入，又從門裡出來； 他們的王在他們面前走過， 耶和華領導他們。

ccb.text: 开路者要走在他们前面， 带领他们冲出敌人的城门。 他们的王走在前面， 耶和华亲自引导他们。”
